backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Resume data types and CRUD operations (save, get, delete) keyed by session token using a Map, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features—blue background and high-contrast text visibility—to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base with OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, applied to body background and foreground via utility classes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a sticky header, welcome screen gate, split form/preview layout, and action buttons for saving, downloading HTML, and downloading an image.
frontend/src/components/CertificationsSe: Repeatable form section for certification entries (name, issuer, issue date, expiry date) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/EducationSection: Repeatable form section for education entries (degree, major, institution, graduation year) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSectio: Form section component for managing work experience entries, supporting add/remove/update operations for fields like job title, company, dates, and description.
frontend/src/components/PersonalInfoSect: Form section component for editing personal information fields including name, job title, email, phone, address, professional summary, LinkedIn, and GitHub URLs.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePhotoSect: Component for uploading and previewing a profile photo via file input, with object URL management and a remove option.
Form section component for managing project entries, supporting add/remove/update for fields like project name, tech stack, link, and description.
frontend/src/components/ResumeForm.tsx: Main resume form component that composes all section components (personal info, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications, photo) inside an accordion layout.
frontend/src/components/ResumePreview.ts: Read-only resume preview component that renders all form data as a styled, print-ready HTML layout including a skill bar visualization and placeholder states for empty sections.
frontend/src/components/SkillsSection.ts: Form section component for managing skills with a name input and proficiency level selector (Beginner–Expert), supporting add/remove per skill row.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: Renders a full-screen welcome/landing page with feature highlights and a 'Get Started' CTA button that triggers the onStart callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadImage.ts: Custom hook that captures a referenced DOM element, renders it via SVG foreignObject to a canvas, and downloads the result as a PNG file.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadPDF.ts: Custom hook that builds a styled HTML document from ResumeFormData (including base64-encoded profile photo) and triggers a download as an HTML file intended for PDF printing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports useGetResume and useSaveResume hooks that fetch and persist resume data to the ICP backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useResumeData.ts: Manages resume form state with local storage persistence and backend sync, providing mapping utilities between frontend ResumeFormData and the backend Resume type.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining light/dark theme CSS custom properties using oklch colors (blue-toned background), Tailwind directives, base element styles for form inputs/labels, utility shadow classes, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/types/resume.ts: TypeScript type definitions and default factory functions for resume form data, including PersonalInfo, Education, Experience, Skill, Project, and Certification structures.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Utility module for generating and persisting a random 48-character hex session token in localStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Inter/Playfair Display fonts, oklch-based CSS variable color mappings, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion/fade/slide keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features (blue background and text visibility fixes), known issues, and configuration for the resume builder app.
